_note: The Kapitalflusstabelle works by a SIMPLE sign split: every credit is an Einnahme, every debit is an Ausgabe. ALL transactions land in the table — nothing is dropped and (with the CSV info-row filter) nothing falls to review. A matcher-less rule matches everything of its sign, so no counterparty/purpose rules are needed. If Jan's real table later wants finer categories (Wareneinkauf, Personal, …), add higher-priority rules ABOVE these two and a matching bucketTarget in the excel-map — still config-only, no engine change.
